mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests), 0) AS total_requests, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'SUBMITTED'), 0) AS pending_review_requests, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_orders WHERE status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS')), 0) AS active_work_orders, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE_FORMAT(completed_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS completed_this_month FROM dual

SELECT rr.id, rr.request_no, rr.student_name, CONCAT(rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) AS location_text, rr.fault_category, rr.status, rr.submitted_at FROM repair_requests rr ORDER BY rr.submitted_at DESC, rr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
